name: Sinofortune Financial Holdings Limited
summary: Sinofortune Financial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the selling of motor vehicles and provision of agency services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company offers securities and futures brokerage, and securities margin financing services; and precious metals spot trading and brokerage services. It also provides securities and futures contract trading and wealth management services; electronic trading platform; and stock information and analysis services. In addition, the company is involved in the trading and principal investment activities; and provision of education information and consultancy service. Further, it sells medicines, and calligraphy and painting. The company was formerly known as First China Financial Network Holdings Limited and changed its name to Sinofortune Financial Holdings Limited in June 2017. Sinofortune Financial Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
